Test name: CBNAO (60 km/h)

Test Description

In this scenario, the subject vehicle travels forwards towards a bicyclist which is crossing in a perpendicular direction from the nearside of the vehicle, from behind an obstruction.

  • Regulation or protocol: EURONCAP 2023 TP AEB/LSS VRU
  • Ego speed: 60 km/h
  • Target speed: 20 km/h
  • Target start distance: distance necessary to reach target speed at DL
  • Ego vehicle distance to obstruction: 3.55 m
  • Target distance to obstruction: 4.8 m
  • Overlap: 50 %
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
Home Summary Repetition 1 Repetition 2 Repetition 3
←CBNAO (30 km/h) CBNAO (60 km/h)


Test Summary

Observations

There are only three repetitons on this test because of data quality. Mobileye system has no detections until the last few meters due to the camera's field of view (FoV), which is much narrower compared to Autobrains (Mobileye has 52 degrees horizontal FoV, while AB has 118.7 degrees). Therefore, in many of the repetitions, Mobileye has few points and only in a distance very close to the target. Again, Autobrains detects the bicycle behind the car at distances between 25 to 35 m in two repetitions.
